description: Frozen, labeled eval set for the token-parity harness. Each case carries the terse winnowed graphi answer (citation-backed) versus a realistically-sized whole-file-read baseline (graphi's real source files run 460-2700 tokens). The harness tokenizes both with the fixed offline tokenizer and computes the per-case ratio. Capabilities are drawn from the canonical MCP tool registry + CLI command set (query.Operations + search). Frozen evidence for OQ4, not a model call.
